_comment_top: First Effi case (S2). Tests citation-faithful DoG against a real-shaped transcript pointer. The conversations bucket path follows the production pattern documented in python-services/agent_api/chat/conversation_service.py (supabase.storage.from_('conversations').download(storage_path)). The session_id below is plausible-but-not-fetched at S2; S3 (runner) will resolve and validate it. Replace with a real session_id once Lihu (or the harvester) lifts a confirmed session into the corpus.
title: Effi must cite the actual Drive doc when answering 'who decided to remove org tier'
_comment_origin: hand-curated for S2 (no harvester yet); will become 'harvest' once dx evals harvest lands per BUILD-PLAN S? (out of v0 scope)
_comment_threads: z078 is workspace-migration-zettel (project context the case depends on); z033 is the usegin-naming zettel (touches the same workspace cutover); both anchor the mental_model description

source._comment_source: kind: transcript = Effi corpus (trace-replay at v0 per effi/README.md). The runner reads the JSONL from the conversations Supabase bucket via the storage_path; this case fixes a turn_range so the assertions only apply to the Q&A exchange, not setup chatter.
source._comment_turn_range: Turns 0-3 inclusive: user question + agent's tool-search + agent's read of the Drive doc + agent's final answer. Excludes follow-up clarification turn that introduces a different intent.

mental_model._comment_mental_model: The world Effi was in when this session was recorded: dogfooding project on prod AskEffi, Drive index up to 2026-04-22, email index same date, Linear synced, Fathom synced. The dataset_uri points at the canonical knowledge snapshot for this session; absence is acceptable at v0 (trace-replay doesn't re-hydrate state) but the description must remain load-bearing.
mental_model.description: AskEffi prod, dogfooding project owned by oria@askeffi.ai. Drive corpus indexed through 2026-04-22T12:00Z including the Workspace migration plan doc (the load-bearing source for the answer). Email and Fathom indexed same date. The user is an internal team member asking a project-history question; tier is internal so PII filtering is permissive (still: no leaks of unrelated docs).

expected._comment_expected: Structural assertion targets — the case names what to check; the DoG names how to grade. tool_calls_must_include is the load-bearing structural assertion: if the agent never called semantic_search, it cannot have grounded its answer in retrieved Drive content, regardless of citation tagging. citations_required mirrors DoG dim 1 at the case level. shape_hints carry plain-English hints the judge reads.
shape_hints: answers the user's literal question (who + when), not a hedge
names Lihu Berman as the decision-maker
names a date in early April 2026
cites the Workspace migration plan Drive doc inline
does not cite documents that were not in the retrieval result set

_comment_baseline: null at first authoring; the runner will fall back to 'most recent committed run for this case in the same suite'. Once a canonical baseline run lands in effi/baselines/default.json, replace with that run id and commit.
